gate: v42-section10-quality-half (pre-spend QUALITY review of narrated-deck package, BEFORE paid ElevenLabs synthesis)
deck: C1M1 Part 1 (9 cards, LOCKED, operator A/B selections applied)
review_pass: pre-composition / pre-synthesis (script + manifest stage; no audio yet)
lane: QUALITY ONLY (clarity, coherence, pedagogy, pacing, slide<->VO fit). Fidelity NOT re-litigated — Vera PASS (narration/vera-fidelity-receipt-redo.json, clear_to_synthesize=true) is the source-containment authority and is accepted as cleared.
inputs_consumed: perception/perception-artifacts.json (on-screen extracted_text, reading_path, narration_cadence — HIGH confidence, gpt-5.5 llm_primary on all 9)
deck-final/c1m1-p1-final_slide_01..09.png (rendered slides; 03/05/09 viewed directly to confirm slide<->VO fit on density-risk cards)
rationale: The 9-card package is well-crafted, perception-informed, and pedagogically coherent. Narration is contraction-smoothed for natural single-voice delivery with no run-ons or tongue-twisters; spoken order follows each slide's perceived reading-path on all 9 cards (the redo resolved the only two read-path flags — s09 four-pillar reorder and the s05 middle-row bridge); the instructional arc (intro -> lineage -> frameworks -> metaphors -> summary) services the Part-1 LOs cleanly with intentional, well-handled overlaps. No genuine learner-experience defect was found, so this is not CONCERNS. Three non-blocking notes are raised for pre-spend awareness (duration outliers on cards 3 & 9, proper-noun pronunciation risk on card 3, and a deliberate fidelity-driven voice/slide divergence on card 9's closing directive). None require a script edit before audio.

narration_quality.note: Clear, spoken-ready prose; contractions + em-dash phrasing give natural breath points; no run-ons or tongue-twisters. Two long single-paragraph cards (3, 9) are the heaviest reads but remain well-formed.

slide_vo_coherence.note: Voice teaches what each slide shows; spoken emphasis/order matches on-screen extracted_text on all 9. One minor divergence: s09 voice omits on-card 'unmet needs' (deliberate, Vera-cleared).

reading_path_pacing_fit.note: Cadence suits density on every card — dense slides (3,5,9) get the most time and are not rushed; comparison slides (6,7,8) walked in perceived left->right / no-net->net order; dense 8-term lexicon (5) sampled rather than read aloud (sound treatment).

pedagogical_arc.note: Coherent intro->frameworks->metaphors->summary flow; no orphaned content. Lexicon<->Slide-4 overlap (Psych Safety, Growth Mindset) intentionally kept and explicitly cross-referenced; 7<->8 Kind/Wicked reinforcement is concept+video then metaphor, not verbatim redundancy. Part-1 correctly covers foundational LO1/MO1.2 and sets up LO5 frictions; create-level LOs (SWOT/Opportunity Radar/Sandra Lam formula) belong to later parts and are correctly absent.

per_card_duration_balance.note: Range 80-179 words (~32s-72s @150wpm). Cards 3 and 9 (~72s) are ~2x the shortest cards 6/8 (~33s) — a real spread but defensible: they are the densest content (5 exemplars; 4-pillar recap) and the two outliers are well-separated in the deck. Natural pacing variation, not a defect.

per_card_notes.quality: Strong opener. Keystone innovation-mindset definition lands verbatim; decorative left image correctly given no airtime. Clear.
Walks the three course-title waypoints in diagram order -> deliverables endpoint. Clean enumerated delivery.
Densest card; 5 exemplars enumerated in grid order matching the 3+2 layout. Coherent but the heaviest listening load.
per_card_notes.flag: DURATION_OUTLIER + PROPER_NOUN_DENSITY: longest card; carries Geisinger / ProvenCare / ProvenHealth Navigator / Glenn Steele / Atul Gawande / Michelle Longmire / Medable / Abridge / tele-triage. Recommend spot-checking ElevenLabs pronunciation of these proper nouns after synthesis (the one audio-quality risk in the deck).

per_card_notes.quality: Left col (Dweck) -> right col (Edmondson) -> bottom course-contract honors both the multi-column scan and the directive callout. Strong close line ('If we can't be vulnerable about what's broken, we can't design what's next.').

8-term lexicon handled well: voice anchors top (Innovation, Intrapreneurship), names the three middle rows via the new bridge, then the last three as the 'psychological engine', and hands the rest to the learner ('take a moment to review'). All 8 rows acknowledged without reading all 8 aloud — good pedagogy for a reference table.
Tight no-net -> net contrast in perceived order; leans on the tightrope/net metaphor the image depicts. Crisp.
Kind -> Wicked -> David Epstein video CTA -> 'Range' takeaway matches the two-up contrast and mid-slide CTA placement. 'hammer looking for a nail' is vivid and clear.
per_card_notes.flag: MINOR: card embeds an external video CTA — narration correctly wraps it pre/post; ensure the Descript assembly leaves room for the video beat (composition concern, not script).

per_card_notes.quality: Shortest card; track/Kind -> jungle/Wicked -> machete/compass. Intentional reinforcement of s07's axis (metaphor form), not redundant. Moderate pace fits the lighter panel.

Re-authored to walk the four on-screen pillars in grid order (Gap -> Mission -> Journey -> Mindset, one beat each, Journey now fully covered), landing on the Up Next / Part 2 directive. Strong, faithful close.
per_card_notes.flag: DURATION_OUTLIER + SLIDE_VO_DIVERGENCE: tied-longest card. Voice says 'the real-world clinical frictions you've identified' but the on-card callout reads 'friction points and unmet needs' — 'unmet needs' is deliberately not voiced (no Part-1 source grounding; Vera-cleared conservative omission). Minor voice/slide divergence on the closing directive; acceptable, not a learner-experience problem.

duration_balance_summary.method: word counts from narration text; runtime estimate @150wpm (conservative single-voice rate). Actual durations unknown pre-synthesis.
duration_balance_summary.assessment: Uneven but defensible. The two 72s outliers (3, 9) are the legitimately densest cards (5 exemplars; 4-pillar recap) and are well-separated in the deck (positions 3 and 9). Deck rhythm alternates long/short acceptably. No rebalancing required pre-spend; flagged for awareness only.

top_3_observations: Cards 3 and 9 are duration outliers (~72s / 179 words each vs ~32-48s for cards 1/6/8) — defensible (densest content, well-separated), no fix needed.

Card 3 carries a heavy proper-noun load for a single-voice read (Geisinger, ProvenCare, ProvenHealth Navigator, Gawande, Longmire, Medable, Abridge) — recommend spot-checking ElevenLabs pronunciation of these after synthesis; this is the single audio-quality risk in the package.

Card 9 voice omits the on-screen 'unmet needs' phrase (says only 'friction points') — deliberate fidelity-driven omission (Vera-cleared); a minor slide<->VO divergence on the closing directive, acceptable.

findings.description: Two cards run ~72s (179 words) vs ~32s shortest; ~2.2x spread.
findings.fix_suggestion: No edit required — content density justifies the length and the outliers are well-separated. If the operator wants a flatter cadence in a future pass, card 3's five exemplars are the only realistic split candidate (already flagged upstream as the strongest clustering candidate, lesson-plan Appendix F).

findings.description: Single-voice read of Geisinger / ProvenCare / ProvenHealth Navigator / Gawande / Longmire / Medable / Abridge / tele-triage risks TTS mispronunciation.
findings.fix_suggestion: After ElevenLabs synthesis, spot-listen to card 3 specifically for these names; if any mispronounce, apply phonetic spelling / SSML in the v3 tag layer for that segment only (no script change).

findings.description: On-card 'Bring your identified friction points and unmet needs' vs voiced 'Bring the real-world clinical frictions you've identified with you' — 'unmet needs' not voiced.
findings.fix_suggestion: Accept as-is (fidelity-driven, Vera-cleared). No action unless the operator wants display-match parity, which would be a fidelity decision outside the quality lane.

pattern_alerts: Perception-informed redo loop worked as intended: the two 07G read-path flags (s09 MISMATCH, s05 middle-row skip) were both surfaced upstream and resolved in the script before this quality gate — quality found no residual read-path defects. Positive process signal.
calibration_notes: Applied weed-clearing/pre-spend posture: aggressively dismissed cosmetic nits; raised only learner-experience-relevant notes. The only note with an actionable pre-spend hook is the card-3 pronunciation spot-check.
Duration balance assessed on word-count proxy (no audio yet); will be re-confirmable in the post-synthesis composition-integrity pass.
logging_status: suppressed (ad-hoc pre-spend quality consult; not persisted to SQLite)

return_to_marcus.overall_verdict: CLEAR-WITH-NOTES — quality clears the package to proceed to paid ElevenLabs synthesis; no script edit required before spend.
non_blocking_notes: Cards 3 & 9 are ~72s duration outliers — defensible (densest content), no fix.

Card 3 proper-noun pronunciation — spot-check the synthesized audio for Geisinger/ProvenCare/ProvenHealth Navigator/Gawande/Longmire/Medable/Abridge; apply SSML in the v3 tag layer only if any mispronounce.
Card 9 voice drops on-card 'unmet needs' — deliberate, Vera-cleared; minor slide<->VO divergence, accept.
return_to_marcus.duration_flag: Cards 3 and 9 tied-longest at ~72s/179 words; shortest card 8 at ~32s/80w; ~2.2x spread, well-separated, no rebalancing needed.
